# REST API Endpoints

> Generated: 2026-02-14 21:38:42 UTC

All endpoints require authentication unless noted otherwise. Send a JWT token
or API key in the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header.

---

## Core

| Method | Path | Description | Auth |
|--------|------|-------------|------|
| `GET` | `/api/health` | Health check — returns `{ status: "ok", timestamp }}` | None |
| `GET` | `/api/version` | Returns the application version from package.json | None |
| `GET` | `/api/me` | Returns the authenticated user info | None |

## Sessions

Base path: `/api/sessions`

| Method | Path | Description | Auth |
|--------|------|-------------|------|
| `GET` | `/api/sessions` | Lists Claude Code sessions from ~/.claude/projects/ JSONL history. If project is provided, filters to only that project's encoded directory. Otherwise returns sessions from all projects. | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `GET` | `/api/sessions/:id/messages` | Reads a session JSONL file and returns user/assistant messages. | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `DELETE` | `/api/sessions/:id` | Deletes a session JSONL file. | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `DELETE` | `/api/sessions/project/:dir` | Deletes all sessions in a project directory. | JWT (Bearer token) |

## Agent

Base path: `/api/agent`

| Method | Path | Description | Auth |
|--------|------|-------------|------|
| `POST` | `/api/agent/run` | one-shot execution with SSE streaming | JWT or API Key (Bearer ck_...) |
| `POST` | `/api/agent/sessions` | create a persistent session | JWT or API Key (Bearer ck_...) |
| `POST` | `/api/agent/sessions/:id` | send message to existing session (SSE stream) | JWT or API Key (Bearer ck_...) |
| `GET` | `/api/agent/sessions/:id` | get session info | JWT or API Key (Bearer ck_...) |
| `DELETE` | `/api/agent/sessions/:id` | abort and remove session | JWT or API Key (Bearer ck_...) |

## Apikeys

Base path: `/api/keys`

| Method | Path | Description | Auth |
|--------|------|-------------|------|
| `GET` | `/api/keys` | list all API keys for current user | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `POST` | `/api/keys` | create a new API key | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `DELETE` | `/api/keys/:id` | revoke an API key | JWT (Bearer token) |

## Tasks

Base path: `/api/tasks`

| Method | Path | Description | Auth |
|--------|------|-------------|------|
| `GET` | `/api/tasks` | list tasks for a project | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `GET` | `/api/tasks/:id` | get single task | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `POST` | `/api/tasks` | create task | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `PUT` | `/api/tasks/:id` | update task | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `DELETE` | `/api/tasks/:id` | delete task (cascades to subtasks) | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `POST` | `/api/tasks/reorder` | reorder tasks | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `POST` | `/api/tasks/parse-prd` | use Claude to break a PRD into tasks (SSE stream) | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `POST` | `/api/tasks/:id/expand` | use Claude to break a task into subtasks (SSE stream) | JWT (Bearer token) |

## Graphs

Base path: `/api/graphs`

| Method | Path | Description | Auth |
|--------|------|-------------|------|
| `GET` | `/api/graphs` | list graphs for a project | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `GET` | `/api/graphs/:id` | get single graph with full data | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `POST` | `/api/graphs` | create graph | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `PUT` | `/api/graphs/:id` | update graph | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `DELETE` | `/api/graphs/:id` | delete graph | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `POST` | `/api/graphs/generate-prompt` | Create or trigger generate prompt | JWT (Bearer token) |

## Graph Runs

Base path: `/api/graph-runs`

| Method | Path | Description | Auth |
|--------|------|-------------|------|
| `GET` | `/api/graph-runs` | list runs for a graph | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `GET` | `/api/graph-runs/:id` | full run with timeline & executions | JWT (Bearer token) |
| `DELETE` | `/api/graph-runs/:id` | delete a run | JWT (Bearer token) |
